title: Messi vs Salah as Argentina face Egypt with World Cup quarters on the line
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
Lionel Messi’s Argentina go up against Mohamed Salah’s Egypt in a spicy World Cup round of 16 encounter.

Four wins to go. How can your team reach the final and win the World Cup 2026? Click here to find out.

Who : Argentina vs Egypt
What : FIFA World Cup 2026 – Round of 16
Where : Atlanta Stadium, Atlanta, Georgia, the United States
When : Tuesday, July 7, at 12pm (16:00 GMT)
How to follow : We will have all the build-up on
